name: LeRobot
description: Operate a real SO-101 workflow end-to-end: procurement, assembly, teleop recording, and ACT policy training.

access.label: LeRobot CLI + connected SO-101 hardware
access.detail: Requires LeRobot tooling in the runtime, a physically connected SO-101 leader/follower setup, and explicit human approval before purchases, hardware motion, and long GPU training jobs.

tools.name: lerobot
tools.detail: LeRobot CLI entrypoint for hardware and training workflows.

tools.name: HF_TOKEN
tools.detail: Hugging Face token for dataset and policy upload; keep secret.

tools.name: HF_USER
tools.detail: Hugging Face user or org for dataset and policy repo IDs.

endpoints.name: SO-101 guide
endpoints.detail: SO-101 assembly, motor config, and port setup guide.

endpoints.name: SO-101 serial ports
endpoints.detail: Leader and follower serial ports configured on the host machine where teleop and evaluation run.

capabilities.name: lerobot
capabilities.detail: LeRobot CLI entrypoint for hardware and training workflows.

capabilities.name: HF_TOKEN
capabilities.detail: Hugging Face token for dataset and policy upload; keep secret.

capabilities.name: HF_USER
capabilities.detail: Hugging Face user or org for dataset and policy repo IDs.

capabilities.name: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
capabilities.detail: Optional GPU pinning for ACT training jobs.

variables.label: Hugging Face account
variables.value: HF_USER and HF_TOKEN configured in the runtime used for recording and training

variables.label: SO-101 order status
variables.value: ordered and shipped with recorded tracking number

variables.label: Assembly state
variables.value: assembled and motors configured per LeRobot SO-101 docs

variables.label: Robot connection
variables.value: leader/follower arms connected and visible on local serial ports

variables.label: Training hardware
variables.value: single local GPU or approved cloud GPU for ACT

steps.title: Confirm procurement
steps.detail: Order SO-101 parts and record the tracking number in project notes before setup work starts.

steps.title: Assemble and wire
steps.detail: Follow the SO-101 guide, configure motors, and connect leader/follower arms over USB.

steps.title: Record teleop data
steps.detail: Collect quality demonstrations in a Hugging Face dataset repo for the target task.

steps.title: Train ACT policy
steps.detail: Train and evaluate ACT on the recorded dataset, then publish the policy artifact.

agentGuide.summary: Use LeRobot when an agent must run the SO-101 hardware loop from setup through teleop data recording and ACT policy training with Hugging Face-hosted artifacts.
useCases: Track SO-101 setup from procurement to assembled and connected arm control.
Record teleoperated demonstrations and push datasets to Hugging Face Hub.
Train and evaluate ACT policies for concrete SO-101 tasks.
Diagnose robot-port, camera, and runtime setup issues before expensive runs.
setup: Read Hugging Face LeRobot docs first and keep hardware setup notes in shared project memory.
Before any arm motion, verify clear workspace, emergency-stop reachability, and supervised operation.
Treat purchases and cloud-GPU spend as approval-gated actions.
Record dataset repo_id, policy repo_id, command, port mapping, camera config, and commit when reporting results.

commands.label: Check LeRobot install
commands.detail: Confirms the LeRobot CLI is available in the current runtime.

commands.label: Find SO-101 ports
commands.detail: Identify serial ports for SO-101 leader and follower buses.

commands.label: Record teleop dataset
commands.detail: Collect demonstrations with consistent camera setup and task labeling.

commands.label: Train ACT
commands.detail: Baseline ACT recipe for single-GPU imitation learning.

commands.label: Evaluate ACT
commands.detail: Runs policy inference and records evaluation rollouts.

env.name: HF_TOKEN
env.detail: Hugging Face access token for pushing datasets and policies; keep secret.

env.name: HF_USER
env.detail: Hugging Face user or org used in dataset and policy repo IDs.

env.name: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
env.detail: Optional GPU pinning for ACT training jobs.
